title: Prompt Lifecycle, Monitoring, and Production Capstone · Contract Workshop
summary: Ship and maintain a cross-provider prompt system with regression evidence. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a production prompt portfolio and release gate while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Store owners, versions, model assumptions, templates, and evaluation links in a prompt registry.
Block prompt releases on material deterministic, rubric, safety, or human-review regressions.
Monitor outcome, refusal, tool, latency, cost, and drift signals without logging sensitive content unnecessarily.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.
